_readme: Edit the numbers below on GitHub (pencil icon > change values > Commit changes) and the live dashboard picks them up automatically on next page load. Each array has exactly 7 numbers, one per tier, in this order: Free, Economy, Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Diamond. tier_totals = total units in that tier. sold/portout/pick = units in each status. Do not edit 'available' or 'Total' anywhere -- the dashboard computes those automatically as tier_totals minus sold minus portout minus pick, and Total as 574 + 575.
